name: Queen Coral
description:
Coral is the is the current queen of the SeaWing tribe and is renowned in the Kingdom of the Sea for writing countless scrolls. She views her own writing highly and believes that all SeaWings should read her work. Coral is overprotective towards her daughters. But she didn't care too much about well-being of her subjects and can punish them harshly if they fail in their duties. Coral believes in genetic superiority of royals and views lower-born SeaWings as lesser beings. She also beleives in superiority of her tribe.

Art: by Mike Holmes and Joy Ang
